summary: Full e2e testing of Emara Software Solutions website. All backend APIs (projects/inquiries/settings CRUD) pass (13/13 pytest). Frontend renders fully after the webpack-dev-server fix - hero, services, portfolio, inquiry form, admin hub, and admin CRUD all functional end-to-end. Inquiry email simulation works as expected (no Resend key, inquiry persists). Verified project add appears on both admin list and public portfolio.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager (low priority - still works).
Frontend handleProjectSubmit re-fetches /api/projects after CREATE/UPDATE - the optimistic state update one line above is redundant (minor).
Hardcoded fallback target email 'inquiries@emarasoftware.com' duplicated in server.py (seed_data + get_settings + create_inquiry) - extract to a constant.
App.js is 1180+ lines - consider splitting into smaller modules (Hero, Portfolio, Admin, etc.). Not blocking.
test_credentials: No auth required. Admin accessed via UI toggle (data-testid=nav-btn-admin-panel).
seed_data_creation: Backend self-seeds 4 projects + default settings on startup if collections empty. Verified seed exists. Test data (TEST_ prefix) created and cleaned up by the pytest + playwright runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API endpoints all return correctly with _id field (alias for id) which the React frontend depends on. Backend seeds 4 projects + 1 settings doc on startup. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_emara_api.py covers projects CRUD, inquiries CRUD + status toggle, and settings GET/PUT.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration.
